    <item>

        <title>Joan Beringer: Double-double with seven blocks</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/joan-beringer-6576</link>
        <description>Beringer produced 24 points (9-12 FG, 6-9 FT), 13 rebounds, seven blocks and two assists across 31 minutes during Sunday's 132-126 win over New Orleans.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 12 Apr 2026 10:36:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>

        <title>Jeremiah Fears: Scores 36 in regular-season finale</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jeremiah-fears-6546</link>
        <description>Fears totaled 36 points (12-28 FG, 0-5 3Pt, 12-14 FT), 10 rebounds, five assists, two steals and one block across 41 minutes during Sunday's 132-126 loss to the Timberwolves.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>

    </item>

        <description>Hield provided 31 points (12-18 FG, 7-11 3Pt), three rebounds, three assists and one steal across 21 minutes during Sunday's 143-117 loss to Miami.

        <description>Adebayo finished with 25 points (11-18 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 2-4 FT), 10 rebounds, three assists, two blocks and three steals across 29 minutes during Sunday's 143-117 victory over the Hawks.
